# Scout Report: Codebase Context for Distributed Benchmark

*Generated by explore agent*

## Reusable Components (move to worker binary)

| Component | Location | Notes |
|-----------|----------|-------|
| `ConnStats` struct | main.go:33-44 | Atomic counters, HDR histograms — reuse as-is |
| `GroupStats` struct | main.go:46-48 | Simple container — reuse as-is |
| `connectWS()` | main.go:212-353 | Full WS connection loop — reuse entirely |
| `connectGRPC()` | main.go:355-451 | Full gRPC streaming loop — reuse entirely |
| `wsStatsWorker()` | main.go:142-209 | Stats pipeline — reuse entirely |
| `extractTimestampInt64()` | main.go:453-468 | Byte-level timestamp extraction — reuse |
| `mergeGroupHistogram()` | main.go:470-476 | HDR histogram merging — reuse |
| `aggregateGroup()` | main.go:478-487 | Counter aggregation — reuse |
| Report printing | main.go:586-743 | Reuse structure, coordinator aggregates from workers |

## Needs Modification

| Component | Change |
|-----------|--------|
| `groups` global (9 groups) | Parameterize — coordinator assigns shards to workers |
| `main()` flow | Split: worker runs connections, coordinator orchestrates timing |
| Stats reporting | Workers must serialize ConnStats for transmission |
| Histogram | Use `Encode()`/`Decode()` for wire transfer |

## New Components Needed

| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| New `.proto` file | Coordinator-worker control plane protocol |
| Worker binary | Accepts config, runs connections, reports stats |
| Coordinator binary | Dispatches work, collects results, prints merged report |
| Worker deployment | systemd/Docker for remote machines |

## Existing Proto

**benchmark-client/proto/benchmark.proto** (SUT proto, not control plane):
```protobuf
service BenchmarkService {
  rpc StreamMessages(StreamRequest) returns (stream StreamResponse);
}
message StreamResponse { repeated MessageEntry messages = 1; }
```

## Docker Compose Pattern
- Each server type: 2 compose files (bridge + host mode)
- Bridge: 3 replicas + nginx load balancer
- Host: 3 containers with `network_mode: host`
- Total: 6 docker-compose files for gRPC, uWS, Go WS servers

## run-benchmark-1gb.sh Flow
Kafka setup → Docker build → PM2 start → Health check → Topic reset → Run scenarios (3/30/90 conns) → System info
